release_notes: Crew Finder availability now uses the bulk shifts endpoint end-to-end, filtered to confirmed-only commitments for conflict detection. Non-confirmed shifts (declined/pending/no-show) are surfaced informationally on the timeline as blue bars so the operator has context. Forecast utilisation hours now correctly exclude non-confirmed shifts. Already-booked crew no longer self-conflict with their target call. CONFLICTED label now renders correctly in the availability cell.
